sn22.73:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the uninstructed worldling does not understand as it really is the gratification, the danger, and the escape in the case of form, feeling, perception, volitional formations, and consciousness.
sn22.73:1.2: "But, bhikkhus, the instructed noble disciplesn.iii.82understands as it really is the gratification, the danger, and the escape in the case of form, feeling, perception, volitional formations, and consciousness."
